name: Cursor CLI
description: Plugin (not a Skill) — invoke local Cursor CLI from OpenClaw with policy-controlled plan-first delivery. Install via: openclaw plugins install -l <dir>. Do not copy to ~/.openclaw/skills/.

agentPath.description: Full path to the agent command (agent.cmd / agent). Leave empty for auto-detection. The plugin will auto-resolve the underlying node + index.js binary

agentNodeBin.description: Direct path to the Node.js executable bundled with Cursor CLI (e.g. .../versions/2026.x.x-xxx/node.exe). When set with agentEntryScript, bypasses .cmd/shell script resolution

agentEntryScript.description: Direct path to the Agent entry script (e.g. .../versions/2026.x.x-xxx/index.js). Must be used together with agentNodeBin

noOutputTimeoutSec.description: No-output timeout in seconds; process is considered hung if no output for this duration, default 120

model.description: Model for Cursor CLI to use, e.g. claude-4-sonnet. Leave empty for default

enableMcp.description: Whether to enable MCP servers (--approve-mcps), default true

mcpApprovalMode.description: MCP approval mode: approve (default), force (approve + --force), off (disable MCP approval args)

enableTrust.description: Whether to pass --trust to Cursor CLI, default false

projects.description: Optional project alias to path mapping. If omitted, plugin defaults to `workspace` -> <current-agent-workspace>/projects

allowAbsoluteProjectPath.description: Allow absolute path project input outside projects mapping, default false

allowedModes.description: Allowed execution modes across command/tool policy

allowAgentModeForCommand.description: Allow /cursor command to execute agent mode, default false

allowAgentModeForTool.description: Allow cursor_cli tool to execute agent mode, default true

requireMappedProjectForAgent.description: Require mapped project for agent mode execution, default true

toolDefaultMode.description: Default mode used by cursor_cli tool when mode is omitted (default agent)

commandRequireAuth.description: Whether /cursor command requires auth, default true

prefixArgs.description: Extra CLI args inserted before standard args (advanced/testing)

sessionTtlSec.description: Session persistence TTL in seconds, default 604800

enforcePlanBeforeDevelopment.description: Force development-class tasks to run plan mode first until project is plan-approved, default true

verboseLogs.description: Enable detailed runtime logs (console.log/info) for troubleshooting, default false

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum concurrent Cursor CLI processes, default 3

enableAgentTool.description: Whether to register Agent Tool for PI Agent auto-invocation (fallback mechanism), default true

agentPath.label: Agent CLI Path
agentPath.help: Full path to Cursor CLI (agent.cmd / agent). Leave empty to auto-detect. The plugin auto-resolves the underlying node binary

agentNodeBin.label: Node Binary Path
agentNodeBin.help: Direct path to Node.js executable bundled with Cursor CLI. Use with Entry Script for manual override

agentEntryScript.label: Entry Script Path
agentEntryScript.help: Direct path to Agent index.js entry script. Use with Node Binary Path for manual override

allowAbsoluteProjectPath.label: Allow Absolute Project Path
allowAbsoluteProjectPath.help: Allow project argument to be an absolute path outside projects mapping

allowAgentModeForCommand.label: Allow Command Agent Mode
allowAgentModeForCommand.help: Allow /cursor to run in agent mode

allowAgentModeForTool.label: Allow Tool Agent Mode
allowAgentModeForTool.help: Allow cursor_cli tool to run in agent mode

toolDefaultMode.label: Tool Default Mode
toolDefaultMode.help: Default mode when cursor_agent tool mode is omitted

enforcePlanBeforeDevelopment.label: Enforce Plan Before Development
enforcePlanBeforeDevelopment.help: When enabled, development-class tasks must complete plan phase before agent execution

verboseLogs.label: Verbose Logs
verboseLogs.help: Enable detailed plugin runtime logs for troubleshooting. Keep off in normal operation

enableTrust.label: Enable --trust
enableTrust.help: Pass --trust flag to Cursor Agent CLI

projects.label: Project Mapping
projects.help: Project name to local path mapping

enableAgentTool.label: Enable Agent Tool
enableAgentTool.help: Register cursor_cli tool for PI Agent auto-invocation in conversations. Must be enabled in tools.allow
